articles.title: 5 interior offensive linemen options for Patriots after Garrett Bradbury trade
articles.description:
The Patriots will seemingly be on the hunt for a left guard this offseason, with Jared Wilson potentially moving to center.

The post 5 interior offensive linemen options for Patriots after Garrett Bradbury trade appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots seek new left guard after Garrett Bradbury trade on March 7, 2026.
Jared Wilson may transition to center, altering offensive line dynamics.
Local fans anticipate changes in team performance and strategy this offseason.
